raw: {"perspective": "Readiness Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "Energy Adaptation mode is not properly synced across devices", "recommended_fix": "Implement device syncing for Energy Adaptation mode using Supabase"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/grievance.py", "issue": "Grievance mechanism does not handle GDPR Article 22 consent properly", "recommended_fix": "Update grievance mechanism to handle GDPR Article 22 consent according to Constitution Law 3"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["memory/atlas/atlas-debts-to-ceo.md", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md"]}

findings.issue: Energy Adaptation mode is not properly synced across devices
findings.recommended_fix: Implement device syncing for Energy Adaptation mode using Supabase

findings.issue: Grievance mechanism does not handle GDPR Article 22 consent properly
findings.recommended_fix: Update grievance mechanism to handle GDPR Article 22 consent according to Constitution Law 3
